title: AN ACT TO CREATE THE BARRIO OF BUÃGAHAN IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF IBAAN, PROVINCE OF BATANGAS.

chunks.text:
H. No. 4600 / 52 OG No. 9, 4204 (August 16, 1956)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1523, June 16, 1956 ]

AN ACT TO CREATE THE BARRIO OF BUÃGAHAN IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF IBAAN, PROVINCE OF BATANGAS.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sitio of Buñgahan in the Municipality of Ibaan, Province of Batangas, is hereby constituted into a barrio in the said municipality, to be known as the barrio Buñgahan.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 16, 1956.
